meta.description: Pentolo Event – The new dimension of show cooking. Where cuisine meets spectacle. Discover the heart of the event.
meta.keywords: pentolo event, show cooking, catering, events, cuisine, spectacle, giant pan, wedding
meta.ogTitle: Pentolo Event – Where Cuisine Meets Spectacle
meta.ogDescription: The new dimension of show cooking. Live cooking for events, weddings, catering, and resorts.

hero.description: The new dimension of show cooking.

heartOfEvent.title: The heart of the event
heartOfEvent.p1: Every event has a moment that makes it unforgettable.
heartOfEvent.p2a: It's not just the dish being served.
heartOfEvent.p3a: The decisive motion of the pan toss.
heartOfEvent.p3b: The aroma spreading through the air.
heartOfEvent.p4: With Pentolo Event, cooking is no longer behind the scenes.

powerAndScenography.title: Power and scenography
powerAndScenography.intro: Thanks to its generous 120 cm size:
powerAndScenography.bullet1: You can cook up to 120 servings at once
powerAndScenography.bullet2: Engage your guests in a real cooking show
powerAndScenography.bullet3: Turn an everyday gesture into a collective experience
powerAndScenography.structure: The stainless steel structure, tilting system, and CEE certification ensure solidity, safety, and reliability.
powerAndScenography.highlight: It is a tool designed to be the protagonist.

bigThings.title: For those who love to do things
bigThings.idealForDescription: For those who don't just want to organize an event, but create a moment to remember.
bigThings.bullet1: Major events and large private parties
